name: Rust
description: Rust dedicated server template using the Pterodactyl Rust runtime image, an explicit SteamCMD install, and native library validation for libRustNative.so.

install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail

cd /mnt/server
export HOME=/mnt/server

appid="${SRCDS_APPID:-258550}"
steam_user="${STEAM_USER:-anonymous}"
steam_pass="${STEAM_PASS:-}"
steam_auth="${STEAM_AUTH:-}"
beta_id="${SRCDS_BETAID:-}"
beta_pass="${SRCDS_BETAPASS:-}"
install_flags="${INSTALL_FLAGS:-}"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps /mnt/server/server/adpanel /mnt/server/cfg /mnt/server/logs /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64

install_steamcmd() {
  local tmp
  tmp="$(mktemp -d)"
  trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' RETURN
  curl --fail --location --show-error --retry 5 --retry-delay 3 --connect-timeout 20 \
    -o "$tmp/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" \
    https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
  tar -xzf "$tmp/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
}

if [ ! -x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh ]; then
  install_steamcmd
fi

steamcmd=(/mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login "$steam_user")
if [ -n "$steam_pass" ]; then
  steamcmd+=("$steam_pass")
fi
if [ -n "$steam_auth" ]; then
  steamcmd+=("$steam_auth")
fi
if [ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL:-0}" = "1" ]; then
  steamcmd+=(+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows)
fi
steamcmd+=(+app_update "$appid")
if [ -n "$beta_id" ]; then
  steamcmd+=(-beta "$beta_id")
fi
if [ -n "$beta_pass" ]; then
  steamcmd+=(-betapassword "$beta_pass")
fi
if [ -n "$install_flags" ]; then
  # shellcheck disable=SC2206
  extra_flags=($install_flags)
  steamcmd+=("${extra_flags[@]}")
fi
steamcmd+=(validate +quit)

for attempt in 1 2 3 4; do
  echo "Installing Rust Dedicated Server app $appid with SteamCMD (attempt $attempt/4)"
  if "${steamcmd[@]}"; then
    break
  fi
  if [ "$attempt" = "4" ]; then
    echo "Rust SteamCMD install failed after 4 attempts" >&2
    exit 21
  fi
  sleep $((attempt * 10))
  install_steamcmd
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh || true
done

if [ ! -x /mnt/server/RustDedicated ]; then
  echo "RustDedicated executable is missing after SteamCMD install" >&2
  exit 22
fi

native_dir=/mnt/server/RustDedicated_Data/Plugins/x86_64
native_lib="$native_dir/libRustNative.so"
if [ ! -f "$native_lib" ]; then
  echo "libRustNative.so is missing at $native_lib after SteamCMD validate" >&2
  echo "The install is incomplete; rerun setup or check SteamCMD output above." >&2
  exit 23
fi

chmod 755 /mnt/server/RustDedicated
chmod -R 755 "$native_dir"

if command -v ldd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  missing_libs="$(ldd "$native_lib" 2>/dev/null | awk '/not found/ {print $1}' | sort -u | xargs echo -n)"
  if [ -n "$missing_libs" ]; then
    echo "libRustNative.so has missing runtime dependencies: $missing_libs" >&2
    exit 24
  fi
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so ]; then
  cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
fi
if [ -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then
  cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
fi

chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/server 2>/dev/null || true
chmod -R u+rwX,go+rX /mnt/server
chmod -R 755 "$native_dir"

echo "Rust Dedicated Server installed and native libraries validated."
